position_news.summary: ICICI Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Allotment of 152760  Shares. |SUBJECT: ESOP/ESOS/ESPS
Newspaper Publication |SUBJECT: Copy of Newspaper Publication
Asian Paints Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Appointment of Mr Sudhir Sitapati as Independent Director of the company w.e.f. May 29, 2026. |SUBJECT: Appointment
Asian Paints Limited has informed the Exchange regarding re- appointment of  Milind Sarwate as Independent Director of the company for a second term w.e.f. October 21, 2026. |SUBJECT: Appointment
Asian Paints Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Change in Director(s) of the company. |SUBJECT: Change in Director(s)
Please find enclosed the summary of the proceedings of the 80th Annual General Meeting of the Company held on Thursday, 9th July 2026 at 11.00 a.m. IST |SUBJECT: Updates
Asian Paints Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Change in Auditors of the company. |SUBJECT: Change in Auditors

recent_announcements.summary: Mangalam Global Enterprise Limited has informed the Stock Exchanges about the inauguration of 2 (Two) new retail stores at Gami Reagan, Ghansoli, Navi Mumbai and Godrej Urban Park, Chandivali, Mumbai, under its "NEAT EVERYDAY" wellness brand on July 10, 2026. |SUBJECT: General Updates

The Exchange has sought clarification from Premier Explosives Limited with respect to recent news item captioned Apollo Micro Systems nears deal to buy Premier Explosives.  The response from the Company is attached. |SUBJECT: News Verification

Victory Electric Vehicles International Limited has submitted to the Exchange, the financial results for the period ended March 31, 2026. |SUBJECT: Outcome of Board Meeting
